case_title: CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC VS. MATTHEW BERGHOLTZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERGHOLTZ, MATTHEW THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1693 MARKET STREET #403 CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CA 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 68820035)

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 68820035), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC SERVED DEC-22-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BERGHOLTZ, MATTHEW
